message:
feat(mux_client): inline send/read logic in _with_cx methods for explicit tracing context

Inline the encode-write and decode-read cycles into send_request_with_cx
and read_next_pdu_with_cx so structured traces carry explicit_cx=true
and phase tags (encode, write_complete, write_error, write_timeout,
decode_buffered_pdu, read_io_error, read_timeout, read_eof,
frame_too_large). Switch subscription loop from get_pane_render_changes
to the Cx-aware variant for proper observability on the hot polling path.

Add integration test list_panes_with_cx_rejects_oversized_response_frame
that spins up a mock mux server sending an oversized ListPanesResponse
and asserts the client returns DirectMuxError::FrameTooLarge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
